shell.trustedLayer: Trusted layer · Local-first · Your data stays on your stack

security.title: Security Center
security.subtitle: Identity, trusted devices, policy posture, and encrypted exports — local-first.
security.accountHint: Bootstrap issues a development session token stored in this browser. Clear it to fall back to the default continuity user.
security.watchSensitiveOptIn: Allow more detail on watch (off by default)
security.devicesHint: Approve or revoke shells that connect to your continuity core.
security.exportHint: Creates a JSON export with AES-256-GCM envelope (dev key). Prefer setting LIFE_OS_EXPORT_ENCRYPTION_KEY (64 hex) in production.

continuity.title: Continuity Center
continuity.subtitle: Sync queue, scheduled jobs, conflicts, and explainability — Hardening Sprint 02.
continuity.syncHint: Local-first mutations are logged and queued. Pause stops outbound processing; your data stays durable.
continuity.jobsHint: Projection refresh and other background work. Retry resets lease state.
continuity.conflictsHint: Deterministic merge outcomes when competing writes are detected.
continuity.whyHint: Trace pipeline steps and explanation reasons for a surfaced entity.
continuity.enterEntity: Enter an entity id to load explanations.

documents.title: Documents
documents.tagline: Uploads run through OCR, classification, and extraction. Evidence stays traceable; you can correct or archive anytime.
documents.emptyBody: Upload a PDF or image from Capture. Processing stays on your stack.

domains.title: Support domains
domains.tagline: Life OS adapts how it helps — across domains, not fixed roles. Domains shape tone and emphasis; capabilities control data access.
domains.uiSubtitle: Derived from your active domains (density, emphasis, simpler explanations).
domains.registrySubtitle: States: not active, passive (quiet), active, restricted. Trust builds from feedback over time.
domains.footerUx: We do not label you as a teacher or doctor — we tune support styles (learning support, wellbeing support, etc.).

detail.adjustSubtitle: Change state or strength anytime. Restricted limits surfacing when sensitivity or trust requires it.

capabilities.title: Capability center
capabilities.tagline: Permission grants access. Trust grants behavior. Adjust activation state with full control — progressive, not all-at-once.
capabilities.hintsSubtitle: Purpose-based capabilities you have not enabled yet.
capabilities.registrySubtitle: Runtime state: not enabled → passive (observation) → active (user-facing, when trust allows).
capabilities.footerNote: Lowering state or revoking purpose permissions in Settings is supported via API; audit logs record changes.

brief.title: Daily Brief
brief.subtitleEmpty: Your calm, prioritized view for today.
brief.subtitleWithDate: Here's what needs your attention first · {{date}}
brief.noBriefBody: Add obligations or capture a note, then run pnpm brief:generate so the engine can assemble today's brief.
brief.needsConfirmationHint: Confirm or dismiss — your memory stays explainable.
brief.attentionLine: Here's what needs your attention first.
brief.explainAssistantDisabled: Local assistant is off on the server (set LLM_ENABLED and run Ollama).
brief.explainAssistantUnavailable: Local model unavailable. Check Ollama and LLM_TIER2_MODEL.
brief.explainAssistantDisclaimer: Suggestion only — not a source of truth. Generated locally when enabled.
brief.explainAssistantSettingsLink: Check local assistant status in Settings
brief.adaptManualFocus: Prioritized with your active focus mode ({{mode}}).
brief.adaptDomainWeight: Domain weight for "{{domain}}" is {{weight}}× (declared or corrected — you can change this in Profile & priority).
brief.adaptLowConfidence: Low-confidence items are shown slightly less often because Life OS noticed similar suggestions were often dismissed.
brief.adaptFooter: Underlying deadlines and evidence are unchanged — only ordering and phrasing adapt.
brief.emptyNoUrgentContinuity: No urgent continuity items right now. Capture a note or check back after the next brief refresh.

mediation.repeatSuppress: Repeatedly dismissed; withholding to reduce noise
mediation.trustGateConfirm: Trust gate: confirm before strong surfacing
mediation.sensitivityVeryHighPrimary: Sensitivity gate: high-stakes content routed to primary surface only
mediation.escalateDelivery: High priority + stable attention; escalated delivery
mediation.sensitivityHighPrimary: Sensitivity gate: detailed handling on primary surface
mediation.sensitivityHighTile: Sensitivity gate: ambient summary only on desk tile
mediation.stableHighRankPhone: Stable attention; high-rank item routed to primary device
mediation.stableLowRankTile: Stable attention; lower-rank as ambient tile nudge
mediation.overloadedWatch: High load; routed to lighter companion surface
mediation.transitionDeferWatch: Transition state; defer minor items to lighter surface
mediation.transitionImportantPhone: Transition state; important items still routed to primary

obligations.title: Open Obligations
obligations.tagline: Nothing important should slip through here.
obligations.emptyPremiumBody: No urgent obligations are open. Capture a note, review your brief, or let Life OS keep watch.
obligations.emptyFilterBody: Try another filter to see matching open items.
obligations.watchLine: System is watching for follow-ups, deadlines, and unresolved commitments.
obligations.railBody: Open items and confirmations roll up here. A full context rail arrives as continuity deepens.

notes.title: Capture
notes.tagline: Frictionless inbox — raw text becomes obligations and context downstream.
notes.emptyBody: Your captures will appear here in reverse order.

settings.title: Settings
settings.tagline: Privacy, devices, and phased features — one place at a time.
settings.localAssistantSubtitle: Tier 2 powers brief explanations; Tier 1 runs the signal policy guard. Toggles live in API env on the host.
settings.localAssistantHint: Configure LLM_ENABLED, ASFLC_ENABLED, Ollama, and apps/asflc-sidecar on the machine running the API. See .env.example in the repo.
settings.deviceSyncLabel: Intent to sync across devices (LAN/VPN; no cloud required)
settings.ambientTileLabel: Show more specific labels on tile (still redacted for amounts; semi-visible surfaces default off)
settings.lifestyleLabel: Opt in to non-medical lifestyle & routine hints
settings.patternsLabel: Opt in to summarized place & screen-time patterns
settings.exportHint: Download a JSON snapshot to copy to a USB drive or NAS. For full DB backup, use <mono>pg_dump</mono> as documented in README.
settings.deviceSyncHint: Register phone/watch/node shells and preview watch payloads on the <ecosystemLink>Ecosystem</ecosystemLink> page.
settings.voiceCaptureSubtitle: Push-to-record only. Raw audio is sensitive — adjust retention and readout here.
settings.voiceTranscriptAutosave: Auto-commit strong transcripts (weak ones stay in review)
settings.spokenReadoutEnabled: Spoken brief readout (stub until TTS is configured)
settings.copilotHint: Inspect the model and cards on the <twinLink>Co-pilot</twinLink> page.
settings.lifestyleHint: Use the <lifeLink>Life flow</lifeLink> page for decisions and errands.
settings.patternsHint: Off by default. Use the <patternsLink>Patterns</patternsLink> page to log data and view insights.
settings.assistantSubtitle: Explainable attention state and per-surface delivery defaults (v3 layer).
settings.assistantNoSnapshot: No snapshot yet — refresh or generate your daily brief.
settings.mediationLogSubtitle: Audit trail for how suggestions were routed or suppressed (e.g. when the daily brief runs).
settings.capabilityCenterLink: Open the capability center for permission → behavior → trust controls.
settings.languageVoiceSubtitle: Modality-specific support (UI, typed assistant, STT, TTS) — not one flat checkbox. Web UI strings follow the shell locale you select when a bundle exists; other selections still apply to the continuity core and future surfaces.
settings.allowAutoLocaleSwitch: Allow automatic locale switching when supported
settings.voiceResolution: Resolved voice routing (stub providers until configured)
settings.languageVoiceFootnote: Quality tiers are honest labels: voice may be partial or controlled for some languages. Real STT/TTS engines are wired via LanguageProviderPolicy in the database.

capture.title: Capture
capture.subtitle: Notes, tasks, and events — each run through the signal pipeline, memory, and Daily Brief.
capture.loopHint: After you save, Life OS normalizes text, extracts cues, updates memory, and refreshes your brief.
capture.noteSubtitle: Best for follow-ups and commitments (e.g. “Follow up with Sam before Friday”).
capture.notePlaceholder: Type freely — this is not shown as raw truth until processed.
capture.taskSubtitle: Structured task with optional due time.
capture.docSubtitle: PDF, image, or plain text — classified and extracted on your stack (camera flow uses the same pipeline).
capture.docDone: Queued document {{id}} — open Documents to review.

memory.title: Memory
memory.subtitle: What Life OS is holding for continuity — layered, decaying, and correctable. Evidence-backed rows sync from processed signals.
memory.empty: No memory nodes yet. Ingest signals (e.g. POST /api/v1/signals/intake) to create evidence-layer memory.
memory.detailError: Could not load this memory node.

everyoneGate.homeOnboardingBody: Choose what Life OS may use (patterns, places, lifestyle) and learn the core loop: capture, brief, follow-through. You can change this anytime.

people.title: People & relationships
people.body: This area links people to events and context. It is optional in the first week — your brief and obligations work without it. Continue if you want to explore, or return to the brief.

timeline.title: Timeline & events
timeline.body: The timeline helps prep and follow-ups around dated commitments. Core follow-through still lives in Obligations and the Daily Brief.

admin.title: Admin & intake tools
admin.body: Admin surfaces are for structured intake and review. Most day-to-day use stays on Brief, Capture, and Obligations.

meProfile.title: Your profile
meProfile.body: Profile refines how Life OS prioritizes — it is powerful but optional early on. The brief already reflects what you capture and confirm.

profileTools.title: Priority & adaptation
profileTools.body: These tools tune ranking and explanations. Safe to skip until you want finer control; Everyone Mode keeps the Daily Brief calmer at first.

patterns.title: Patterns & routines
patterns.body: Pattern insights summarize optional signals you have opted into. They never replace obligations or evidence — explore when you are ready.

lifeFlow.title: Life flow
lifeFlow.body: A broader planning view on top of the same continuity core. Use it when you want more structure than the brief alone.

copilot.title: Co-pilot / twin
copilot.body: An interpretive layer on your records — not a separate source of truth. Continue if you want this view; otherwise the brief stays authoritative.

ecosystem.title: Ecosystem & devices
ecosystem.body: Device registry and companion surfaces for your stack. Optional unless you are setting up phone, watch, or tile-style displays.

tile.title: Tile simulator
tile.body: Preview redacted glance payloads for small surfaces. Developer-oriented; everyday use is the Daily Brief and Capture.

capabilities.title: Capabilities
capabilities.body: Fine-grained access to what automated assistance may do. Defaults are conservative; open when you want to expand scope deliberately.

domains.title: Domains
domains.body: Domains shape tone and emphasis across the product. Useful for power users; not required for follow-through in the first week.

memory.title: Memory graph
memory.body: Structured continuity memory with evidence and correction. Transparent but dense — the brief surfaces what matters day to day.

documents.title: Documents
documents.body: Uploads for extraction and traceable evidence. If you only need quick capture, use Capture or Notes first.

connectors.title: Connectors
connectors.body: Bring data in from linked sources. Optional and explicit — core use does not require connectors.

suggestions.title: Suggestions
suggestions.intro: Pending follow-through nudges. Dismiss or mark false positive to train Life OS; snooze to revisit.
suggestions.empty: No pending suggestions. Run pnpm suggestions:recompute if you have open obligations.

errors.apiUnreachable: Can't reach the Life OS API. Start the continuity core (e.g. API on port 3000) and ensure the web dev server proxies /api to it.
errors.VALIDATION: Check your input and try again.
errors.BAD_REQUEST: That request could not be completed.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have access to that.
errors.INTERNAL: Something went wrong. Try again later.
